prompt: Invent an original, vivid metaphor for the experience of learning a new language as an adult. Explain it in three sentences.
response: Learning a new language as an adult is like embarking on a journey to a surreal, mirrored dimension. You leave the comforts of your native tongue behind, stepping into a captivating yet uncharted world that resembles your own. As you explore this alternate reality, you gradually discover that the more you understand, the more your perception of the world around you shifts, granting you access to a kaleidoscope of cultures and perspectives that were once just a blurry reflection in the distance.
